rejected.name: seed_005

reason: Seed_002 is the best human-reviewed start: it keeps the AI51 side-primer identity reasonably intact while reading as a usable left-facing platformer attack frame. The current condition-v1 scorer is not trusted for this punch/action run because it ranks seed_005 higher despite weaker action intent and side-profile read.
next_step: Run a larger 576x864 seed sweep with the same identity primer, prompt, pose, contour, boundary mask and condition settings.
